title: Devpilot production-grade MVP readiness closure
objective: Move Devpilot from live rehearsal and demo-evidence deliverability to production-grade MVP handoff readiness.
source_evidence: git status --short shows the active S011 worktree closure diff in server-executor readiness/history query code, its focused spec, demo runbook, and the full-flow TODO.
.agent-board/board.json previously ended at G002/S010 with status deliverable_with_demo_evidence.
docs/devpilot/demo-runbook.md contains the reproducible demo and production notes that must be hardened into production-ready packs.
completion_standard: The current worktree is closed with focused verification and board evidence.

Production config, command policy, agent operation, trace governance, permission/tenant E2E, resource-request loop, and backup/restore/upgrade handoff items are either implemented and verified or recorded as explicit external blockers.
Each slice S011-S018 has changed files, verification logs, remaining risks, and a next-slice decision.
No old rehearsal/demo evidence is deleted to improve readiness appearance; history remains auditable.
worker_policy: One active write slice in this checkout at a time.
Read-only Architect, Verifier, or Reviewer work may run in parallel only when it cannot edit source.
Do not read old sessions unless a slice explicitly needs a named evidence artifact.

cleared_blockers: S016 live permission/tenant E2E cleared by S019 against a disposable local Devpilot API.
Restore first-class product implementation blocker cleared by S020 via backup restore dry-run endpoint/job.
Local provider/resource/deploy/task-pull/backup/restore/rollback staging blocker cleared by S021 against disposable Docker containers.
external_signoff_required: Real provider/resource provisioning requires approved provider credentials and staging/prod targets.
Production backup/rollback and live restore rehearsals require approved target details and release-owner signoff.
